candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue label with identical values; useful as fallback label change.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Non-operating finance income, not sales.
Interest income, not top-line revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability/deferred income item, not reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct cost / cost of sales style aggregate line; preferred over underlying components.
Underlying component of materials and services, so less preferred than the aggregate direct-cost line.
Underlying inventory adjustment component, not standalone COGS when aggregate exists.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not period cost.
Balancing row should never be preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the direct-cost aggregate line and avoided summing its components.

candidates.why: Looks like operating overhead component rather than direct production cost.
Personnel cost is a core overhead bucket when no explicit SG&A line exists.
Subcomponent of employee benefits, so less preferred than broader personnel-cost line.
Overhead-related compensation component, but likely already included in employee benefits.
Overhead subtotal, but component rows exist underneath, so subtotal is less preferred.
Clear SG&A component.
Dedicated above-EBIT R&D line; include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear SG&A component.
Supplemental/non-primary statement disclosure; less preferred than main income statement line.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.
Headcount metric, not expense row.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. No explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' row exists. Chose overhead components and excluded COGS, D&A, finance items, and subtotal/balancing rows. Included the dedicated R&D line in XSGA so that XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization line, not the dedicated R&D expense itself.
Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line on the income statement.
Supplemental disclosure, less preferred than primary statement line.
Balance sheet capitalized development asset, not expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Primary choice is the dedicated above-EBIT income statement line. Supplemental label included only as fallback in case of reporting-label changes across periods.

candidates.why: Total finance expense includes FX and other non-interest items; less preferred than granular recurring components.
Direct interest expense line; strongest match.
Could contain recurring finance costs beyond pure interest; acceptable as additional recurring finance-cost component.
Empty/duplicate-style label, weaker than populated rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental interest detail likely already included in interest expense; selecting it risks double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded FX gains/losses and the broader finance-expense total to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution row, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive loss attributable to Owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow, not equity stock.
Only one component of equity, not total book equity.
Best available total equity line on the balance sheet.
Duplicate casing variant of the same total equity line; useful as fallback label change.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line is shown, so using total equity as BE. Per rule, this implies MIB should be empty to avoid double counting.
No non-controlling interest / minority interest line appears on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
